name: missing_ticker_spy_substitution
description: Ticker 'XYZ' is absent from all 50 historical days; SPY is present every day. When XYZ is not in day_data, the returns_matrix cell is set to spy_ret (the missing-ticker SPY substitution). All portfolio returns are therefore identical to the SPY daily returns. This pins that the missing-ticker fallback produces a valid, finite result in [0, 100]. num_days is 50 so the history is eligible-sufficient under Ruling 2 (AC-4).
derivation: XYZ absent from all days -> returns_matrix uses spy_ret (the missing-ticker SPY substitution). historical SPY returns are +-0.005 -> +-0.5 pct after scaling. current_symphony_return = 0.003 * 100 * 1.0 = 0.3. Re-captured from the fixed producer at branch fix/mc-knn-exit-gate HEAD c3834d0 (Cluster 2) with run_monte_carlo(..., seed=42), num_days=50. The value shifted from the pre-Cluster-2 48.38 because AC-1 standardizes the kNN feature vector and AC-4 excludes the early-window days; num_days raised 30->50 so the history is eligible-sufficient under Ruling 2. Provenance: captured-from-the-fixed-producer.
